executionArgs.additionalInstruction: RIGOROUS FULL AUDIT. App URL: http://localhost:3000/#/login (HashRouter, base is /). Owner tab = Google sign-in only (popup account picker). User/Mentor tabs = User ID + password. Test credentials: loginUser forging275@gamil.com password *Matrix1234*. Test ALL areas: (1) Auth - login logout role tabs protected routes, (2) Security - public profile edits without auth, unauthorized route access, (3) Data - CSV import, duplicate devotees, attendance submission, (4) Performance - large lists loading, rapid form submits, (5) Navigation - all sidebar routes, event detail, public attendance URL with hash #/public-attendance/:id, (6) Error states - invalid login, profile not found. Document every failure with steps to reproduce.
